# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Native memory leak fix**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 fixes a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — Calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) leaked a native image handle when a subset was requested. The handle is now correctly released. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
